summary: Completed end-to-end testing of BIBI Cars admin-curated catalog. Backend APIs are 100% functional. Frontend is mostly working with minor UI interaction issues.

minor_issues.issue: Requires 'make' and 'model' fields even for partial updates
minor_issues.impact: Cannot do true partial updates - must send all required fields
minor_issues.workaround: Send make and model fields along with other updates

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown suggestions are not clickable due to overlay interception
ui_bugs.details: Hero content div intercepts pointer events preventing clicks on search suggestions. Error: '<div class="frame-component18_heroContent__Kk49E"> from <main class="flex-grow bibi-about__main"> subtree intercepts pointer events'

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with correct credentials returns JWT token
Backend: Create car with POST /api/admin/cars returns id, slug, and correct budget_bucket
Backend: GET /api/public/cars returns only published cars
Backend: GET /api/public/cars/search?q=audi returns autocomplete suggestions
Backend: GET /api/public/cars/buckets returns counts for all 6 budget buckets
Backend: GET /api/public/cars/{slug} returns car detail with similar cars
Backend: PATCH /api/admin/cars/{id} updates car and recalculates budget_bucket
Backend: GET /api/admin/cars without token returns 401 (auth required)
Backend: GET /api/admin/cars with token returns all cars including unpublished
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/cars/{id} successfully removes car
Frontend: Home page loads with budget filter chips (ALL / <10K / 10-15K / 15-25K / 25-40K / 40-60K / 60K+)
Frontend: Budget filter chips are clickable and filter works correctly
Frontend: Header search input shows autocomplete dropdown for 'audi' query
Frontend: Header search shows empty state for unknown query 'xxxlambo'
Frontend: SingleCarPage loads with Welcome-style design (navy/cream/amber palette)
Frontend: SingleCarPage shows hero image with price (~32,000 €) and REQUEST A QUOTE CTA
Frontend: SingleCarPage shows quick specs grid (mileage, transmission, drive, engine)
Frontend: SingleCarPage shows Expert Recommendation section with admin note
Frontend: SingleCarPage shows Full Specifications section with 10+ spec rows
Frontend: SingleCarPage shows Lead CTA section at bottom
Frontend: Admin login works correctly and redirects to /admin dashboard
Frontend: Admin sidebar shows exactly 6 entries (Панель, Клиенты, Калькулятор, Каталог авто, Уведомления, Настройки)
Frontend: Admin /admin/cars page shows cars with Create button, Edit button, Delete button, and Publish toggle
Frontend: /catalog redirects to / (home page)
Frontend: /admin/wishlist-deals redirects correctly (requires auth)
Frontend: /admin/parser-* routes redirect correctly (requires auth)
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Fix CarSearchDropdown overlay issue - search suggestions are not clickable due to hero content div intercepting pointer events. 2. Consider making PATCH /api/admin/cars/{id} accept true partial updates without requiring 'make' and 'model' fields (low priority).
